source_refs.source_quote: The boiler must be connected to the mains fused 3 A 230 V 50 HZ supply & control system using cable of 3 core 0.75 mm 3183Y multi strand flexible type.

fault_codes.description: Indication that products of combustion & inlet air are mixing - further investigation is required.
possible_causes: Products of combustion & inlet air are mixing
manufacturer_steps: Check all flue components are correctly assembled, fixed & supported.
Check the flue & terminal are unobstructed.

source_refs.source_quote: Verify Flue Integrity Indication that products of combustion & inlet air are mixing - further investigation is required. Check all flue components are correctly assembled, fixed & supported. Check the flue & terminal are unobstructed.

fault_codes.code: Is O2 "," CO2 out of range
fault_codes.description: O2 and CO2 levels out of range (O2 "," 20.6% and CO2 < 0.2% is false).
manufacturer_steps: The appliance MUST NOT be commissioned until all problems are identified and resolved.

source_refs.source_quote: Is O2 "," 20.6% and CO2 < 0.2%? No TURN APPLIANCE OFF! Call 0344 871 1545 for advice. The appliance MUST NOT be commissioned until all problems are identified and resolved.

fault_codes.code: Is CO "," CO/CO2 ratio out of range
fault_codes.description: CO and CO/CO2 ratio out of range (CO < 350ppm and CO/CO2 ratio < 0.004 is false).
manufacturer_steps: The appliance MUST NOT be commissioned until all problems are identified and resolved.
If commissioning cannot be fully completed the appliance must be disconnected from the gas supply in accordance with the GSIUR.
Note: Check & record the CO & combustion ratio at both maximum & minimum rates before calling 0344 871 1545.

source_refs.source_quote: Is CO < 350ppm and CO/CO2 ratio < 0.004 ? No TURN APPLIANCE OFF! Call 0344 871 1545 for advice. The appliance MUST NOT be commissioned until all problems are identified and resolved. If commissioning cannot be fully completed the appliance must be disconnected from the gas supply in accordance with the GSIUR. Note: Check & record the CO & combustion ratio at both maximum & minimum rates before calling 0344 871 1545.

manufacturer_steps: Check all burner seals, internal flue seals, door & case seals.
Replace any seals that appear unsound.

source_refs.source_quote: Verify Integrity of Seals Check all burner seals, internal flue seals, door & case seals. Replace any seals that appear unsound.

fault_codes.description: Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected
manufacturer_steps: Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

source_refs.source_quote: A.00 .34 Outdoor temperature sensor expected but not detected OUTDOOR SENSOR NOT DETECTED Connect the outdoor sensor Outdoor sensor is not connected correctly

manufacturer_steps: Check the system pressure and restore it
Check the pressure of the expansion vessel
Check for any system / boiler leaks

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .06 Low water pressure Check the system pressure and restore it Check the pressure of the expansion vessel Check for any system / boiler leaks

manufacturer_steps: Re-enter the CN1 and CN2 values
check the information shown on the data plate

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .18 OBD error CONFIGURATION ERROR Re-enter the CN1 and CN2 values, check the information shown on the data plate

manufacturer_steps: Check the connection and the connectors

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .36 Functional device disconnected SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Check the connection and the connectors Faulty SCB, replace the board

manufacturer_steps: Check the connection and the connectors

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .37 Passive functional device disconnected SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Check the connection and the connectors Faulty SCB, replace the board
A.02 .45 Connection error SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function
A.02 .46 Device priority error SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function
A.02 .48 Unit function configuration error SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function
A.02 .49 Failed node initialisation SCB BOARD NOT DETECTED Carry out the auto-detect function

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .54 Open Therm bus power supply error Replace the CU-GH board
A.02 .55 Incorrect or missing serial number Replace the CU-GH board

fault_codes.description: Internal memory reserved for full customisation of settings. No further changes can be made
manufacturer_steps: Re-enter the values CN1 and CN2

source_refs.source_quote: A.02 .76 Internal memory reserved for full customisation of settings. No further changes can be made CONFIGURATION ERROR Re-enter the values CN1 and CN2 Replace the CU-GH board
H.00 .42 Pressure sensor open/faulty RESET PROCEDURE IN PROGRESS No action required

fault_codes.description: Temporary communication failure between gas valve and boiler PCB.

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .00 Temporary communication failure between gas valve and boiler PCB. MAIN PCB ERROR Configure CN1/CN2 Replace the main PCB

fault_codes.description: Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached.
manufacturer_steps: Check the cleanliness of the exchanger
Check the operation of the temperature sensors
Check the connection of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .05 Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle Check the installation pressure OTHER CAUSES Check the cleanliness of the exchanger Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the connection of the temperature sensors

fault_codes.description: Flow temperature increase in heating mode too quick. Temporary stoppage of 10 minutes.
manufacturer_steps: Check the cleanliness of the exchanger
Check the operation of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .08 Flow temperature increase in heating mode too quick. Temporary stoppage of 10 minutes. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle Check the installation pressure OTHER CAUSES Check the cleanliness of the exchanger Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the temperature sensor connection
H.01 .14 Maximum flow temperature value reached. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle

manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pump
Check the operation of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .18 No water circulation (temporary). INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the installation pressure Activate a manual venting cycle Check the operation of the pump Check the boiler/installation circulation TEMPERATURE SENSOR ERROR Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the temperature sensor connection

fault_codes.description: Flow temperature increase in domestic water mode too quick. Temporary stoppage of 10 minutes.
manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pump
Check the operation of the temperature sensors

possible_causes: SIGNAL INDICATING BLOCKING INPUT ACTIVE OR FROST PROTECTION ACTIVE

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .09 Partial stoppage of the boiler SIGNAL INDICATING BLOCKING INPUT ACTIVE OR FROST PROTECTION ACTIVE External cause: remove the cause Parameter configuration error: check parameters Faulty wiring connection: check wiring

H.02 .10 Complete stoppage of the boiler BLOCKING INPUT SIGNAL (WITHOUT FROST PROTECTION) External cause: remove the cause Parameter configuration error: check parameters Faulty wiring connection: check wiring

extraction_notes: Original Gemini response was malformed JSON and was repaired by the pipeline.
overall_confidence was missing or invalid and was set to 0.0 by the pipeline.
